runtimeGate.requirement: Chrome or headless browser renders nonblank UI, major elements, and major operations.
runtimeGate.method: Playwright Chromium desktop and mobile projects

checks.name: unit-and-build
checks.evidence: Vitest 4 files / 12 tests passed; Vite production build passed.

checks.name: runtime-gate
checks.evidence: 2 Playwright projects passed: chromium and mobile-chrome; checks include Japanese default UI, internal language switch API, one-row primary controls, top-toolbar settings reset, hidden queue/settings section headings, image-list show/hide toggle, folder import replacement, manual image-list reset, export auto-reset, larger thumbnail-only queue, mobile horizontal settings groups, visible canvas, hidden editor status text, settings toggle, canvas edit, persisted suffix, and ZIP export.

checks.name: production-preview
checks.evidence: HTTP 200 for the built dist artifact.

checks.name: github-pages-mirror
checks.evidence: index.html, favicon.svg, icons.svg, and bundled assets copied.
